name: Smoked Salmon Rolls with Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the smoked salmon slices in hot water, drain, and dry.
2. At the end of each slice, place 5 oysters.
3. Roll the salmon over the oysters.
4. Arrange the rolls on a shallow, greased baking pan.
5. In a saucepan, combine white wine, fish stock, parsley, shallots, onion, crushed peppercorns, garlic, and cloves. Bring to a boil, then simmer until the sauce reduces to 1/2 cup. Strain the sauce into another pan.
6. Add cream or creamy sauce and tomato paste to the strained sauce in the pan. Bring to a boil and remove from heat.
7. Sauté mushroom caps in butter until done, then place on each salmon roll.
8. Pour the sauce over the salmon rolls, sprinkle with grated Swiss cheese, and broil until the cheese melts. Serve immediately.
